phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Zurriola Bridge is
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿podría decirme dónde está el puente Zurriola?
phrases.pronunciation: per-DOHN, ¿poh-DREE-ah deh-SEER-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH el PWEHN-teh soo-ree-OH-lah?

likely_response.local: Cruce el Kursaal, está justo enfrente.
likely_response.pronunciation: KROO-theh EHL koor-sah-AHL EHSTÁ HOO-stoh ehnf-REHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight along the waterfront, it is nearby.

responses.english: Go straight along the waterfront, it is nearby.
responses.phonetic: KROO-theh EHL koor-sah-AHL EHSTÁ HOO-stoh ehnf-REHN-teh
responses.french: Cruce el Kursaal, está justo enfrente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find riverside cafés
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿hay cafeterías cerca de la ribera?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh AHY kah-feh-teh-RÍ-ahs THEHR-kah DEH LAH ree-BEH-rah

likely_response.local: Sí, en el Paseo de Urumea, cerca.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ EHN EHL pah-SEH-oh DEH oo-roo-MEH-ah THEHR-kah
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, along the Paseo de Urumea, nearby.

responses.english: Yes, along the Paseo de Urumea, nearby.
responses.phonetic: SÍ EHN EHL pah-SEH-oh DEH oo-roo-MEH-ah THEHR-kah
responses.french: Sí, en el Paseo de Urumea, cerca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Kursaal Bridge is
phrases.text_local: ¿Me dice cómo llegar al puente del Kursaal?
phrases.pronunciation: meh DEE-seh KOH-moh yeh-GAHR al PWEHN-teh del koor-SAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga recto junto al auditorio Kursaal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh HOON-toh AHL ah-oo-dee-toh-REE-oh koor-sah-AHL
likely_response.translation_en: The Kursaal Auditorium is facing the sea.

responses.english: The Kursaal Auditorium is facing the sea.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh HOON-toh AHL ah-oo-dee-toh-REE-oh koor-sah-AHL
responses.french: Siga recto junto al auditorio Kursaal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the riverfront promenade starts
phrases.text_local: Perdone, ¿dónde comienza el paseo de la ribera del Urumea?
phrases.pronunciation: Per-DO-neh, DON-deh ko-MYEN-sas el pa-SEH-oh de la ree-BEH-rah del oo-ROO-meh-ah?

likely_response.local: Siga recto hacia el río, allí comienza.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh ah-THEE-ah EHL RÍ-oh ahl-LÍ koh-mee-EHN-thah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow straight towards the river, it starts there.

responses.english: Follow straight towards the river, it starts there.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh ah-THEE-ah EHL RÍ-oh ahl-LÍ koh-mee-EHN-thah
responses.french: Siga recto hacia el río, allí comienza.
